PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
    PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Yumrepo')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
        PsiElement(<|)('<|')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(|>)('|>')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(->)('->')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCollectionImpl(COLLECTION)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Package')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetCollectRHandImpl(COLLECT_R_HAND)
        PsiElement(<|)('<|')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetCollectionStatementImpl(COLLECTION_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetCollExprImpl(COLL_EXPR)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('provider')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(==)('==')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('yum')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(|>)('|>')
